oai_dc:dc.dc:title: A Message from the President
oai_dc:dc.dc:creator: LePage, Mary Ellen
oai_dc:dc.dc:description: This item originally appeared in AFA Watchbird Volume 49 Number 2 (July 2022).The following is an excerpt from the full PDF link.The American Federation of Aviculture (AFA) invites you to come to our 48th Annual Educational Conference to be held August 5-7 (Friday-Sunday) in Herndon, Virginia (near Washington, DC). We have a wonderful slate of presenters for you, fun get-togethers, fun raffles and auctions, fun bird show, fun free-flying show, and a fun banquet. But most of all, it is so much fun to get together and share our love of birds.And AFA has $99 room nights at the Hyatt Regency Dulles hotel. What a deal! If you come Thursday, you may also attend the legislative meeting.Click the PDF link associated with this item to view the complete item as originally published.
oai_dc:dc.dc:source: AFA Watchbird; Vol. 49 No. 2 (2022): Watchbird July 2022; 3
